/cwe/weakness/1058.Name: Invokable Control Element in Multi-Thread Context with non-Final Static Storable or Member Element
/cwe/weakness/1058.Description:
The code contains a function or method that
		 operates in a multi-threaded environment but owns an unsafe non-final
		                     static storable or member data element.
/cwe/weakness/1058.ExtendedDescription: This issue can prevent the product from running reliably. If the relevant code is reachable by an attacker, then this reliability problem might introduce a vulnerability.
